title: USMNT player ratings: No Pulisic? No problem: Free...
summary: Tyler Adams and Malik Tillman delivered strong performances, with Alex Freeman standing out in the USMNT match despite missing Pulisic. Freeman's standout play demonstrates the team's offensive depth beyond star players.
content: Strong performances from Tyler Adams and Malik Tillman earned high ratings, but it was Alex Freeman who stood out.

zh.title: 美国国家队球员评分：没有普利西奇？没问题：弗里曼...
zh.summary: 泰勒·亚当斯和马利克·蒂尔曼表现出色，亚历克斯·弗里曼在缺少普利西奇的美国国家队比赛中表现突出。弗里曼的出色表现展示了球队除了明星球员之外的进攻深度。

title: World Cup VAR review: Why was Almiron sent off for...
summary: The article examines major World Cup incidents through VAR protocol and laws of the game, using Almiron's sending off as a case study. Understanding these decisions helps fans grasp controversial calls.
content: For the tournament, we are taking a look at the major incidents to examine and explain the process in terms of both VAR protocol and the laws of the game.

zh.title: 世界杯视频助理裁判评审：为什么阿尔米隆被罚下...
zh.summary: 该文章通过视频助理裁判协议和比赛规则来审视世界杯的重大事件，以阿尔米隆被罚下作为案例研究。理解这些决定有助于球迷理解有争议的判罚。

title: Why Alex Freeman's USMNT goal wasn't offside
summary: Alex Freeman's goal for the USMNT against Australia was initially controversial but correctly ruled onside after VAR review, securing a 2-0 lead. The detailed explanation clarifies the offside positioning.
content: Alex Freeman put the United States 2-0 up against Australia after a VAR review. Here's why the goal was correctly ruled onside.

zh.title: 为什么亚历克斯·弗里曼的美国国家队进球不是越位
zh.summary: 亚历克斯·弗里曼对阵澳大利亚的美国国家队进球最初引起争议，但经视频助理裁判审查后被正确判定为不越位，确保了2:0的领先。详细的解释澄清了越位位置。

title: Transfer rumors, news: Real Madrid eye huge deal f...
summary: Tottenham Hotspur defender Micky van de Ven is the subject of transfer speculation ahead of next season. Real Madrid are reportedly interested in acquiring the versatile defender.
content: Tottenham Hotspur defender Micky van de Ven could be on the move next season. Transfer Talk has the latest.

zh.title: 转会传言：皇马看中范德文大交易
zh.summary: 热刺后卫米基·范德文成为下赛季转会猜测的焦点。据报道，皇家马德里对收购这位全能后卫感兴趣。

title: Haiti first team eliminated at WC as Brazil get wi...
summary: Brazil's five-time World Cup champion team defeated Haiti 3-0 with Vinícius Júnior scoring and assisting on goals from Matheus Cunha. Haiti became the first team eliminated from the 2026 World Cup.
content: Vinícius Júnior scored and assisted on one of Matheus Cunha's two goals as five-time champion Brazil eliminated Haiti from the World Cup with a 3-0 victory on Friday night.

zh.title: 海地首支被淘汰球队，巴西3:0胜利
zh.summary: 五次世界杯冠军巴西队以3:0战胜海地，维尼修斯·朱尼奥尔进球并助攻马特乌斯·库尼亚的进球。海地成为2026年世界杯首支被淘汰的球队。

title: U.S. clinches WC Group D after Paraguay victory
summary: Paraguay's 1-0 victory over Turkey, achieved while playing with 10 men for most of the match, secured the United States the top position in World Cup Group D. The result advances the USMNT through the group stage.
content: Paraguay held on for a 1-0 win over Turkey after playing a man down for more than half the match, a result that secured the United States the top spot in Group D

zh.title: 美国在巴拉圭胜利后锁定世界杯D组头名
zh.summary: 巴拉圭1:0战胜土耳其，在比赛大部分时间以10人作战的情况下取胜，为美国锁定了世界杯D组头名。这一结果使美国男足晋级小组赛。

title: Almiron first to be sent off for covering mouth
summary: Miguel Almirón became the first player sent off under new World Cup rules prohibiting mouth-covering during matches, receiving a red card in Paraguay's Group D match against Türkiye. The incident highlights enforcement of new discipline measures.
content: Miguel Almirón was shown a red card after an altercation in Paraguay's Group D match vs. Türkiye.

zh.title: 世界杯首次因掩嘴被罚下，阿尔米隆成为第一人
zh.summary: 米格尔·阿尔米隆成为首位因世界杯新规则（禁止球员掩嘴）而被罚下的球员，在巴拉圭对土耳其的比赛中获得红牌。这一事件标志着该新规则在锦标赛中的首次实施。

title: Van Hecke: €60M Spurs move 'won't change me'
summary: Jan Paul van Hecke completed his €60 million transfer to Tottenham Hotspur and reassured fans his high price tag won't alter his personal character. The defender expressed confidence in maintaining his core identity at his new club.
content: Jan Paul van Hecke said his €60 million price tag will not change him as a person after completing his move to Tottenham Hotspur.

zh.title: 范赫克：6000万欧转会热刺"不会改变我"
zh.summary: 扬·保罗·范赫克完成了6000万欧元转会热刺的交易，并向球迷保证高额转会费不会改变他的个人性格。这位后卫表示对在新球队保持自我有信心。

title: Morocco 'behind' captain Hakimi amid rape case
summary: Morocco's coach Mohamed Ouahbi expressed support for captain Achraf Hakimi after a French appeals court confirmed he will stand trial on rape allegations. Ouahbi stated Hakimi is mentally prepared and has the team's backing.
content: Morocco coach Mohamed Ouahbi said the team are "behind" captain Achraf Hakimi and says the player is "very relaxed" after a French appeals court confirmed Friday Hakimi will stand trial in a rape case.

zh.title: 摩洛哥队"支持"队长哈基米面对强奸案
zh.summary: 摩洛哥主教练穆罕默德·瓦希比在法国上诉法院确认他将因强奸指控受审后表达了对队长阿什拉夫·哈基米的支持。瓦希比表示哈基米心理上做好了准备，并得到球队的支持。

title: Freeman goal for U.S. 'full circle family moment'
summary: U.S. defender Alex Freeman scored a goal against Australia in what he called a 'full-circle family moment,' marking a career milestone on a field linked to his father Antonio Freeman Jr.'s Green Bay Packers legacy. The USMNT won 2-0.
content: U.S. defender Alex Freeman celebrated a "full-circle family moment" on Friday, scoring a goal in the Americans' 2-0 win over Australia on the same field -- kind of -- where his father, Antonio Freeman Jr., once had a banner day for the Green Bay Packers.

zh.title: 弗里曼进球美国"完整的家庭时刻"
zh.summary: 美国后卫亚历克斯·弗里曼在与澳大利亚的比赛中进球，他称之为"完整的家庭时刻"，这标志着他职业生涯中的一个里程碑，在与他父亲安东尼奥·弗里曼二世绿湾包装工传奇相关的球场上。美国国家队以2-0获胜。

title: U.S. winning the WC not 'ridiculous,' Richards say...
summary: Zlatan Ibrahimović believes the USMNT has a credible chance to win the World Cup, while defender Chris Richards agrees the prospect isn't unrealistic. Both athletes express genuine confidence in the U.S. team's championship potential.
content: Zlatan Ibrahimovic was succinct in saying he thinks that the USMNT has a chance to win the World Cup. Chris Richards doesn't think it's a wild idea at all, either.

zh.title: 美国赢得世界杯并非"荒唐"，理查兹说
zh.summary: 兹拉坦·伊布拉希莫维奇认为美国男足有真实的机会赢得世界杯，后卫克里斯·理查兹同意这个前景并非不切实际。两位运动员都表达了对美国队冠军潜力的真诚信心。

title: Iran to file complaint over WC travel restrictions...
summary: Iran's soccer federation plans to lodge a formal complaint with FIFA after being denied permission to travel to Los Angeles two days before its World Cup match against Belgium. The travel restriction affects the team's preparation.
content: Iran's soccer federation said it will lodge a complaint with FIFA after its request to travel to Los Angeles two days before Sunday's World Cup match against Belgium was denied.

zh.title: 伊朗对世界杯旅行限制提交投诉
zh.summary: 伊朗足球联合会计划向国际足联提交正式投诉，因为被拒绝在世界杯对阵比利时的比赛前两天前往洛杉矶。旅行限制影响了球队的准备。

title: Who am I? Guess World Cup star No 13
summary: This interactive guessing game challenges readers to identify a World Cup star player using limited clues in as few attempts as possible. It provides an engaging way to test knowledge of tournament standout performers.
content: Will you get today's player in as few attempts as possible?

zh.title: 我是谁？猜世界杯明星13号球员
zh.summary: 这个互动猜谜游戏挑战读者用有限的线索在尽可能少的尝试次数内识别一名世界杯明星球员。它提供了一种引人入胜的方式来测试对锦标赛杰出球员的了解。

title: 10-man Paraguay knock out Turkey despite Almiron red card
summary: Paraguay eliminated Turkey from the 2026 World Cup with a 1-0 victory despite playing down to 10 men after Miguel Almiron's red card. The result showcased Paraguay's resilience and tactical discipline under pressure.
content: Watch highlights as 10-man Paraguay win despite Miguel Almiron's red card, eliminating Turkey from the 2026 World Cup.

zh.title: 10人巴拉圭尽管阿尔米隆红牌仍击败土耳其
zh.summary: 尽管米格尔·阿尔米隆被罚红牌后只有10人作战，巴拉圭仍以1-0的比分将土耳其淘汰出2026世界杯。这个结果展现了巴拉圭在压力下的韧性和战术纪律。

title: World Cup first sees Almiron sent off for covering mouth
summary: Miguel Almiron became the first player sent off under new World Cup rules prohibiting players from covering their mouths, receiving a red card in Paraguay's match against Turkey. The incident marked the first enforcement of this new regulation at the tournament.
content: Watch Miguel Almiron become the first player to be sent off under new rules preventing players from covering their mouths during a game at the 2026 World Cup, with the Paraguay midfielder shown red in a win over Turkey.

zh.title: 世界杯首次因掩嘴被罚下，阿尔米隆成为第一人
zh.summary: 米格尔·阿尔米隆成为首位因世界杯新规则（禁止球员掩嘴）而被罚下的球员，在巴拉圭对土耳其的比赛中获得红牌。这一事件标志着该新规则在锦标赛中的首次实施。

title: Scotland fall to narrow defeat against Morocco
summary: Scotland lost to Morocco in World Cup Group C, conceding after just 71 seconds, but remain in contention for the knockout stage with one group match remaining.
content: Scotland concede after 71 seconds and fall to a World Cup defeat against a classy Morocco, but their hopes of a historic knock-out place remain in their own hands with one group game to go.

zh.title: 苏格兰不敌摩洛哥遭一球小负
zh.summary: 苏格兰在世界杯C组中仅71秒后就失球，不敌摩洛哥，但还有一场小组赛要进行，仍有机会晋级淘汰赛。
